title: O Praise the Lord! The Man is Blest

verses.text: Abundant riches in his house will ever be in store; And his unspotted righteousness endures forevermore. Though darkness the just, to him arises light; Compassionate and merciful, he follows what is right.

The man is good and truly blest who freely gives and lends, Who justly governs his affairs, who truth and right extends. There surely is not anything that ever will him move; The righteous man’s memorial will everlasting prove.

And when he hears disturning news, He will not be afraid. His heart is fixed; his confidence Upon the Lord is stayed. Established firmly is his heart; He will not fearful be; Until upon his enemies He his desire will see.

He has dispersed his wealth abroad and given to the poor; His horn with honor shall be raised, his righteousness endures. The wicked looks on angrily; he grits his teeth, dismayed, But melts away, and his desire will into nothing fade.
